# Chapter 15: Infrastructure as system  (~110 pp)
- 15.1 Infrastructures as engineered systems (12) · 15.2 Asset management at scale (15) · 15.3 Lifecycle costs and total-cost-of-ownership (15) · 15.4 Renewal vs replace decisions (12) · 15.5 Coupled infrastructures and systemic risk (18) · 15.6 The political economy of infrastructure (15) · 15.7 Failure section: aging infrastructure and the cost of deferred maintenance (23)

**Archetype**: scaling, ethics, failure. **Project**: study a real infrastructure asset's life-cycle; produce a renewal-vs-replace recommendation. **Exercises**: 25.
